# Pep Dekker

> Pep Dekker builds production software for industries that don't get good
> software: legal ops, commercial fishing labor, longshore dispatch, and
> marine finance. Based in Tacoma, WA. Six live systems across three
> industries, all shipped and in production or active use, not demos.

Contact: dekpep@gmail.com · GitHub: https://github.com/pepdek · LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pepdekker

## Legal Tech

- [LawStack](https://pepdekker.com/projects/lawstack/): Clio-connected AI employees for solo and small law firms. Production. https://lawstack.co
- [Taita](https://pepdekker.com/projects/taita/): Weekly practice health score for solo and small law firms, emailed. Production. https://iq.lawstack.co
- [CourtCal](https://pepdekker.com/projects/courtcal/): Auto-syncs Pierce County, WA court hearings to Outlook/Google Calendar. Early access. https://courtcal.pepdekker.com

## Maritime & Labor

- [CheckMySpins](https://pepdekker.com/projects/checkmyspins/): Dispatch lookup for ILWU Local 23 longshore workers, no server-side storage of registration numbers. Production. https://checkmyspins.com
- [MarineBookkeeper](https://pepdekker.com/projects/marinebookkeeper/): Crew-share settlement calculator for commercial fishing vessels. Production. https://marinebookkeeper.com
- [TenderCrew](https://pepdekker.com/projects/tendercrew/): Job board for Alaska/PNW commercial fishing crews. In development, no public URL yet.

## Financial Services

- [Switchboard](https://pepdekker.com/projects/switchboard/): Competitor-intelligence tool for RIAs and financial advisors, built as a Wealthbox demo. Active work in progress. https://switchboard.pepdekker.com

## Other pages

- [Sitemap](https://pepdekker.com/sitemap.xml)
